flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bluffton University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (718 → 582).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bluffton University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (69.2% → 59.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Bluffton University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (49.5% vs 57.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bluffton University rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (57.7% → 63.6%).
